title: HotlPolicySchemas
description: Schemas for HOTL (Human-on-the-Loop) policy API bodies. Grounded in crates/xiaoguai-api/src/hotl/policy.rs.

HotlPolicy.title: HotlPolicy
HotlPolicy.description: A persisted HOTL policy row returned by GET /v1/hotl/policies and POST /v1/hotl/policies.

window_seconds.description: Rolling window width in seconds. Must be > 0.

oneOf.description: Maximum invocation count within the window. Must be > 0.

max_count.description: Maximum invocation count within the window. Null means no count limit. At least one of max_count or max_usd must be non-null.

oneOf.description: Maximum cumulative USD cost within the window. Must be >= 0.

max_usd.description: Maximum cumulative USD cost within the window. Null means no cost limit. At least one of max_count or max_usd must be non-null.

oneOf.description: Escalation destination — an IM channel name or email address.

escalate_to.description: Escalation destination. Null means deny on breach rather than escalate.

CreateHotlPolicyRequest.title: CreateHotlPolicyRequest
CreateHotlPolicyRequest.description: Request body for POST /v1/hotl/policies. The server generates the 'id' field.

scope.description: Action category to gate (e.g. 'llm_call', 'email_send'). Must not be empty.

window_seconds.description: Rolling window width in seconds. Must be > 0.

max_count.description: Maximum invocation count within the window. At least one of max_count or max_usd must be provided and non-null.

oneOf.description: Maximum cumulative USD cost. Must be >= 0.

max_usd.description: Maximum cumulative USD cost within the window. At least one of max_count or max_usd must be provided and non-null.

oneOf.description: Escalation destination (IM channel or email). Null = deny on breach.
